feed.title: EU Regulatory Changelog
feed.subtitle: Filtered digital-regulation updates from EUR-Lex, EDPB, EDPS, ENISA, and the Commission.

entry.title: Commission fines Temu €200 million for breaching the Digital Services Act
entry.summary: European Commission Press release Brussels, 28 May 2026 Today, the European Commission issued a fine of €200 million to Temu under the Digital Services Act (DSA).
